name: Chili Mac Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can Del Monte chili ready tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the macaroni according to the package instructions, then drain and set aside.
2. In a large pot, cook the chili beans and chili-ready tomatoes until heated through.
3. Stir in the cooked macaroni and about half of the fat-free cheddar cheese until the cheese is melted.
4. Pour the mixture into a baking dish and top with the remaining cheese.
5. Refrigerate or freeze. When ready to eat, heat at 350°F for 20 minutes.
There are infinite ways to make this dish – you could add TVP®, rice, more spices, green chiles, use black beans, etc.
